questions.prompt: Your team hosts every customer as a Cloud PBX instance launched onto a PBXHub Server. Which YCM section holds those customer PBXes?
questions.explanation: Cloud PBX holds managed Cloud PBX instances that YCM provisioned. Device is for remote P-Series appliances added to YCM via remote management, which is a separate use case.

questions.prompt: Which YCM section would you open to assign a shared trunk to a customer's Cloud PBX?
questions.explanation: Repository holds reusable assets the MSP assigns out: provisioning templates, firmware files, backup files, shared trunks, DID numbers. The Cloud PBX detail view also lists currently assigned trunks for one PBX.
